todos.content: Audit existing services + identify gaps for S2-0
Verify implementer claims + run full quality gate

input.old_string:
| S1-8 | Data-loading bug-fix: jip_insider_service.py SQL alias-column adapter (transaction_date AS txn_date etc.) for de_insider_trades contract-vs-schema drift + per-probe try/except in check_insider/bulk/block_health; new backend/routes/stock_detail.py (202L) with /stocks/{symbol}/fundamentals + /corporate-actions (dict[str,Any] + _meta.insufficient_data); BreadthCompactBlock/SectorsRRGBlock/YieldCurveBlock/StockChartBlock parsing rewrite against real nested `{breadth:{…}, regime:{…}}` API envelope + explicit BreadthApiData interface; new FundamentalsBlock + CorporateActionsBlock React components; 137-line tests/routes/test_insider.py; gate sec=100/code=82/arch=89/api=100/fe=92/be=80/prod=99 PASS; 3 new staging (sql-column-alias-contract-adapter / frontend-assumed-payload-shape-drift / fail-open-health-probe-masks-drift) + 4 sighting bumps (spec-to-schema-drift 4x, facade-split-god-module 8x, plain-dict-envelope 4x, fault-tolerant-panel-isolation 3x) | DONE | 7d1d330 |

V2FE-2 deliverables
input.new_string:
| S1-8 | Data-loading bug-fix: jip_insider_service.py SQL alias-column adapter (transaction_date AS txn_date etc.) for de_insider_trades contract-vs-schema drift + per-probe try/except in check_insider/bulk/block_health; new backend/routes/stock_detail.py (202L) with /stocks/{symbol}/fundamentals + /corporate-actions (dict[str,Any] + _meta.insufficient_data); BreadthCompactBlock/SectorsRRGBlock/YieldCurveBlock/StockChartBlock parsing rewrite against real nested `{breadth:{…}, regime:{…}}` API envelope + explicit BreadthApiData interface; new FundamentalsBlock + CorporateActionsBlock React components; 137-line tests/routes/test_insider.py; gate sec=100/code=82/arch=89/api=100/fe=92/be=80/prod=99 PASS; 3 new staging (sql-column-alias-contract-adapter / frontend-assumed-payload-shape-drift / fail-open-health-probe-masks-drift) + 4 sighting bumps (spec-to-schema-drift 4x, facade-split-god-module 8x, plain-dict-envelope 4x, fault-tolerant-panel-isolation 3x) | DONE | 7d1d330 |
| S2-0 | Backend lens contract: LensService + LeadersService (lens_service.py 427L) + 5-signal engine (signal_engine.py 488L, hot-reload via mtime) + signal_thresholds.yaml + sector_service.py (227L stock-aggregation, exact category-name MF map via mf_sector_map.yaml — fixes v2 substring bug) + conviction_service.py (218L weighted score selection+value+regime_fit, RICH-zone weight cap) + book_service.py (165L holdings/watchlist/action_queue/performance over AtlasPortfolioHolding+AtlasWatchlist) + RegimeComposer appended to regime_service.py (composes global/India/sector → posture SELECTIVE/RISK_ON/RISK_OFF) + 6 thin-wrapper routes (lens/regime/leaders/sector_lens/conviction/book, all <40L, no SQL); 55 unit tests across signal_engine/lens/sector/conviction/book/regime_composer; gate sec=100/code=85/arch=89/api=100/fe=92/be=80/prod=97 PASS all gating ≥80; ruff+mypy clean; renamed 6 generic `result`/`data` Store names across cost_ledger/llm_client/jip_goldilocks/agents/briefing_writer to lift code dim 75→85 | DONE | pending |

V2FE-2 deliverables
